layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with a full-width footer bar. The slide uses a left-to-right orientation with two equal-width vertical columns occupying the main content area, separated by a consistent gutter. Each column is a self-contained content section with an icon badge, section header, subheader, and bullet list. The columns are visually unified by a full-width footer bar at the bottom containing partnership messaging. The layout follows the design guidelines' Multi-Column Content Layout (Section 7, Option A) with equal-width columns and section headers, adapted for icon-badged sections. All content is distributed evenly across the vertical space between the title and footer, with no dead zones. The slide uses generous padding appropriate for the moderate content density. Font sizes are increased from the previous attempt to ensure proper vertical fill: bullet list body text is sized in the medium-to-large range (targeting visual fill of 65-70% of container height), section headers are proportionally larger to maintain hierarchy, and icon badges scale proportionally to the header size. This addresses the judge's critique of severe under-fill in both columns.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM): Equal-peer with RIGHT COLUMN, split 1:1 horizontally. Occupies the left half of the content area with a small gutter on the right edge. Structured as a vertical stack: icon badge at top (brand accent filled circle with white laptop icon centered inside, proportional to heading size, horizontally centered within column), followed by section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand primary color bold text (horizontally centered, sized in the large heading range to establish clear hierarchy), followed by subheader 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in body font italic (horizontally centered, brand text color, sized slightly smaller than section header), followed by a bullet list with brand-color circle bullet markers (left-aligned with small left inset, body font in the medium-to-large range to fill vertical space, brand text color). The bullet list contains six items describing platform capabilities: Blockchain monitoring, Entity identification & attribution, Automated risk scoring, Analytics of VASP data, Investigation workbench, Dashboards & analytics. Font size for bullet text is increased to the medium-to-large range (targeting 16-18pt equivalent visual weight) to ensure the text content fills approximately 65-70% of the container inner height, eliminating the empty white space band identified in the judge feedback. Content is distributed vertically with even spacing between the icon, headers, and bullet list using flexGrow to fill available space. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on the slide background. The icon badge is a small decorative element, not dominating, scaled proportionally to the increased header size. All text within the bullet list section is left-aligned with consistent left inset, while the icon and headers are centered within the column width.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING): Equal-peer with LEFT COLUMN, split 1:1 horizontally. Occupies the right half of the content area with a small gutter on the left edge. Structured identically to LEFT COLUMN to maintain within-slide uniformity: icon badge at top (brand accent filled circle with white graduation cap icon centered inside, proportional to heading size, horizontally centered within column), followed by section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand primary color bold text (horizontally centered, sized identically to LEFT COLUMN section header in the large heading range), followed by subheader 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in body font italic (horizontally centered, brand text color, sized identically to LEFT COLUMN subheader), followed by a bullet list with brand-color circle bullet markers (left-aligned with small left inset, body font in the medium-to-large range matching LEFT COLUMN exactly, brand text color). The bullet list contains six items describing training offerings: Foundation training for all staff, Practitioner certification, Specialist programs, Leadership briefings, Hands-on labs, Case study workshops. Font size for bullet text is increased to the medium-to-large range (identical to LEFT COLUMN, targeting 16-18pt equivalent visual weight) to ensure the text content fills approximately 65-70% of the container inner height, addressing the judge's critique of severe under-fill. Content is distributed vertically with even spacing matching LEFT COLUMN's rhythm using flexGrow. No background fill, no border, no container box. The icon badge is a small decorative element scaled proportionally to the increased header size, matching LEFT COLUMN's badge proportions. All text within the bullet list section is left-aligned with consistent left inset matching LEFT COLUMN, while the icon and headers are centered within the column width. The top edge of this column's icon badge aligns exactly with the top edge of LEFT COLUMN's icon badge. All row sections (icon area, header area, bullet list area) share identical vertical positions and heights with LEFT COLUMN to maintain horizontal alignment across the two columns, enforcing Rule B2 (edge alignment) and Rule B5 (baseline alignment).
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Spans the full slide width at the bottom of the content area, below both columns. Compact height, just enough to contain the text with a small vertical inset (approximately 8-10% of slide height). Solid fill using brand primary color. No border. Slightly rounded corners (subtle, not sharp — small corner radius for a soft professional feel). White bold text, horizontally centered and vertically centered, body font size (standard body font, not increased like the column bullet text, as this is a separate visual element with different density requirements). Contains the partnership messaging: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs'. This element provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the partnership value proposition. Positioned with a visible gap above it (separating it from the column content by approximately 3-5% of slide height) and a small margin from the slide bottom edge (respecting safe-area margin of 3-5%). The footer bar acts as a visual anchor and balances the two-column structure above it.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide content (two columns plus footer) fills the available space appropriately with the increased font sizes addressing the previous under-fill issue. No additional background grouping layer is needed. The columns are visually distinct through their icon badges, section headers, and content structure. The footer bar provides visual closure. Adding a background rectangle would add no grouping benefit and would violate Rule C3 (accent color budget) by introducing an additional colored fill element beyond the icon badges and footer bar. The slide achieves proper visual balance through content sizing and spacing alone, consistent with Rule D1 (bottom-layer purpose — only use when content does not fill the slide, which is no longer the case after font size correction).
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed. The two columns are independent parallel content sections (technology offerings vs. training offerings) with no semantic relationship requiring a visual connector. The layout is purely side-by-side comparison presenting two complementary service domains, not a flow, process diagram, or hierarchical relationship. Rule E3 (top-layer minimalism) confirms that elements should only be placed in the top layer when they genuinely span containers or sit above all containers, which does not apply here. Each column is self-contained and complete.
